privileged_info_summary: The task is generative and synthetic, requiring the agent to create a new Gantt chart from scratch in Wondershare EdrawMax. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/migration_gantt.eddx and /home/ga/migration_gantt.png) and the required text node labels match the explicit instructions in the task description and are verified by the export script and verifier.
